recommended_next_action: Phase 10 or next phase in the plan. The two-tier injection system is operational: Tier 1 (core init) activates during project-initiation, Tier 2 (task-conditional) activates when taskClassification is provided. The resolveSkillBundle() API is backward-compatible — existing 3-arg callers continue to work without changes.

implementation_summary.tier1_description: Core init skills (use-hivemind, use-hivemind-delegation, hivemind-spec-driven) loaded during project-initiation phase
implementation_summary.tier2_description: 8 task-conditional rules covering all TaskClassification values: tdd, research, debug, refactor, implementation, codebase-scan, spec-driven, investigation
implementation_summary.exposure_map_integration: resolveSkillBundle() now accepts optional 4th parameter taskClassification. Internally delegates to resolveTieredSkills().
implementation_summary.deduplication: All sources (shared, tier1, agent, tier2, purpose, subsession) deduplicated by skill name
